---
title: "The life and times of Saint Bernard, Abbot of Clairvaux : A.D. 1091-1153"
---

## The life and times of Saint Bernard, Abbot of Clairvaux : A.D. 1091-1153

**Author:** James Augustus Cotter Morison
**Date:** 1863
**Imprint:** London: Chapman and Hall

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
